title: Vanilla Suspicious Stew CIT Pack
description: This pack changes the Texture of Suspicious Stew depending on the type of Effect it gives
body:
## This pack changes the Texture of Suspicious Stew depending on the Type of Effect it gives
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

![InGame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a32b852ec0582c7da234384219ed078a1e0f693.png)

![In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2032648ab5650a32ba3da05766b7c83d4fadf4d0.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
